content.en:
Soon, the white shadow image copied the body, and immediately went to lure the primeval demon ape to copy the body.

It didn't take long for the two replica bodies to meet, and then pretend that the battle was together.

Rumble!

In the process of fighting between the primeval demon ape's replica body and the white shadow image's replicating body, the primeval golden blood was transferred.

Then, the primeval demon ape copied its body and pretended to be defeated and fled.

The White Shadow Elephant Clan was chasing and killing, gradually moving away from this area.

Afterwards.

The white shadow elephant copied the body and transferred the primeval golden blood to another ordinary blood transformation creature that Ye Tian had just copied, and then this ordinary blood transformation realm creature took it away from the ancient ruins.

......

Thundered!!!!

The White Shadow Elephant Clan and the Ancient Demon Ape Clan continued to fight in the Ancient Ruins, even spreading to the area outside the Ancient Ruins.

As a result, many Blood Transformation Realm creatures are on the run.

Whether it was the Ancient Demon Ape Clan or the White Shadow Elephant Clan, they naturally had no time to kill other Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Therefore, Ye Tian's ordinary Blood Transformation Realm creature escaped with other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and was not intercepted along the way.

Everyone is running for their lives, and no one cares about anyone.

Finally, Ye Tian escaped from this area.

Then, he once again put the primeval golden blood on his real body.

Then, he annihilated all the replica bodies in the primeval ruins, leaving no trace.

"Let's go, return to Wanlong's territorial waters!"

As long as you return to Wanlong's territorial waters, that is the real security.

White Elephant City.

A copy of Ye Tian's body is still here, inquiring about the situation.

At this time, information about the ancient ruins also came here.

Many Blood Transformation Realm creatures knew that the Ancient Demon Ape and the White Shadow Elephant Clan had fought.

"Have you heard, the White Shadow Elephant Clan and the Ancient Demon Ape Clan have fought!"

"Why, could it be that the White Shadow Elephant Clan avenged the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan?"

"What kind of revenge, it has something to do with the ancient golden blood. "

"What is Ancient Golden Blood?"

"The Ancient Golden Blood has something to do with the Ancient Arts, but I don't know exactly what the relationship is. In short, the White Shadow Elephant Clan dispatched a lot of Blood Transformation Realm creatures to fight against the Ancient Demon Ape in the Ancient Ruins. According to the current information, it is the primeval demon ape that has cultivated a large amount of primeval golden blood in the primeval ruins, and every drop of primeval golden blood is worth unimaginable, and the white shadow elephant clan is moved, so they snatch it. "

"The ancient gold blood is so precious, I want to snatch it, but unfortunately the strength is too weak, and if I go, I will seek death!"

Time passed, and the battle between the White Shadow Elephant Clan and the Ancient Demon Ape Clan expanded.

The White Shadow Elephant Clan had indeed snatched a lot of primeval golden blood, and had also snatched the formation that gave birth to primeval golden blood, trying to study some mysteries from it.

As for asking the Ancient Demon Ape Clan to hand over the true cultivation method, it is unrealistic, and it can only be studied from the existing materials, and perhaps it can be studied.

......

The Ancient Demon Ape Clan.

At this time, all the primeval demon ape clan were very angry.

This time, he cultivated a lot of primeval golden blood, but more than half of it was robbed, and many primeval demon ape clansmen were also killed.

What's more, the formation that was finally rewarded was destroyed or snatched away, and the cultivation process of the long years was interrupted, which was the biggest loss.

"Did the primeval monitor lizard snatch it back?"

The patriarch of the primeval demon ape clan, Ape Fu, asked.

"The robbery is back, and it is temporarily imprisoned in our prison!" said one of the elders.

"Spread on, in the future, if there is a White Shadow Elephant clan near our territory, kill!"

Ape Fu said angrily.

"Yes!"

Many primeval demon apes responded.

Wanlong territorial waters.

Ye Tian returned safely and brought back the ancient golden blood.

At this time, he breathed a sigh of relief.

"Hahaha, this time I have obtained tens of thousands of drops of primeval golden blood, there should be hope to have practiced the primeval technique primeval god and demon fist!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he began to cultivate the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

He first swallowed a hundred drops of Ancient Golden Blood in one gulp, and then began to refine the energy of Ancient Golden Blood, and then cultivated the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

I have to say that the ancient technique is too mysterious, and the cultivation is too difficult.

As soon as he cultivated, an inexplicable force seemed to crush his flesh and blood, but fortunately, with the protection of the ancient golden blood, the problem would not be very big.

As the years passed, Ye Tian continued to try to cultivate the primeval art of the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

Finally, on this day, the cultivation failed.

Click!

The flesh and blood were torn apart, and the immeasurable bones of the whole body were shattered, and the tendons, veins, internal organs, and immeasurable blood were all messed up.

The point is, the traces left by the primeval technique made it difficult for him to recover this body.

"Every time the Ancient Technique fails, the body will leave traces of failure, and the more times it fails, the more impossible it is to practice the Ancient Technique, which is also the reason why many Blood Transformation Realm creatures cannot practice the Ancient Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, it's not that there is no way at all, such as using incomparably rare treasures to erase the traces of the primeval on the body, so as to allow the injury to recover and the foundation to recover.

But that kind of treasure is probably more precious than the primeval golden blood.

Anyway, he didn't know where to find such a treasure.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian directly gave up such a copy body, re-copied a copy body, and once again cultivated the Ancient Technique, the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

In this way, Ye Tian cultivated again and again, failed again and again, and changed his body again and again.

From the failure at the beginning, to the later slowly summing up the experience, I have a new understanding and perception of this primeval technique, and the success rate of cultivation in the later stage will naturally become higher and higher.

And as time passed, the primeval gold blood continued to be consumed.

A thousand drops!

Three thousand drops!

Five thousand drops!

Ten thousand drops!

......

Before you knew it, 30,000 drops of primeval gold blood were consumed.

Once again, a hundred drops of primeval golden blood were refined by Ye Tian, and he cultivated the primeval god and demon fist again.

This time.

Ye Tian finally succeeded!

Rumble!!!!!

The ancient god and demon fist, an ancient technique, was successfully practiced by Ye Tian, and the terrifying punch shook the entire Wanlong territorial waters, making the Heavenly Ancestors of the Wanlong territorial waters panic, and they thought that something had happened in the Wanlong territorial waters.

With the cultivation of the primeval technique, it turned into a series of imprints and integrated into the whole body, making Ye Tian's body more and more terrifying, this is not a blood change, but a fundamental transformation of the foundation.

Moreover, this time the promotion is too great.

Every second, his strength is improving.

It took a long time for this transformation to be completed.

"I'm still in the three Blood Transformation Realms, and I was only between the four Blood Transformation Realms and the five Blood Transformation Realms before, but now I have definitely stepped into the five Blood Transformation Realms, which is even comparable to the top five Blood Transformation Realms!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
